description: ElementStore game: namespace — universal game structure classes. Covers all elements needed to define and run a 2D game: scenes, characters, sprites, tilemaps, physics, AI, combat, audio, input, camera, effects.

classes.name: Game
classes.description: Top-level game definition. Contains metadata, configuration, and references to all game assets and scenes.

props.label: Pixel Art Mode
props.description: Disable anti-aliasing for crisp pixel rendering

props.label: Palette
props.description: Color palette (optional, for indexed-color games)

classes.name: Palette
classes.description: Color palette definition. Maps index values to RGBA colors. Used for indexed-color games or defining a consistent color scheme.

props.label: Colors
props.description: Array of {index, r, g, b, a, name}

props.label: Bit Depth
props.description: Bits per color channel

classes.name: Charset
classes.description: Character set / tileset. A collection of fixed-size tiles used for background and level rendering. Each tile is a small bitmap (typically 8x8 or 16x16).

props.label: Image URL
props.description: Path to tileset image (spritesheet of all tiles)

props.label: Margin
props.description: Pixels around the edge of the tileset image

props.label: Spacing
props.description: Pixels between tiles in the tileset image

props.label: Color Method
props.description: How colors are assigned to tiles

classes.name: Tile Map
classes.description: Grid-based level layout composed of charset tiles. Each cell holds a tile index and optional properties (color, collision type). Supports multiple layers and object layers for spawn points and triggers.

props.label: Additional Tilesets
props.description: Extra tilesets used by this map

props.label: Tile Layers
props.description: Array of {name, data, visible, opacity, scroll_factor_x, scroll_factor_y}. Data is tile index grid.

props.label: Color Data
props.description: Per-cell color/tint values (for palette-based games)

props.label: Collision Map
props.description: Per-cell collision type: solid, platform, ladder, hazard, collectible, empty

props.label: Object Layers
props.description: Array of {name, objects: [{type, x, y, width, height, properties}]}. Spawn points, trigger areas, decorations.

props.label: Tile Callbacks
props.description: Array of {tile_index_range, event_name}. Events triggered on tile contact.

props.label: Tile Properties
props.description: Per-tile-index custom properties: {tile_index: {walkable, climbable, damage, ...}}

classes.name: Sprite Definition
classes.description: Single sprite frame. Defines a visual image used by characters, objects, or effects. Can reference an image file or a region within a spritesheet/atlas.

props.label: Image URL
props.description: Path to image file or spritesheet

props.label: Frame X
props.description: X offset within spritesheet

props.label: Frame Y
props.description: Y offset within spritesheet

props.label: Origin X
props.description: Pivot point X (0=left, 0.5=center, 1=right)

props.label: Origin Y
props.description: Pivot point Y (0=top, 0.5=center, 1=bottom)

props.label: Tint
props.description: Color tint applied to sprite (hex)

classes.name: Sprite Overlay
classes.description: Composite sprite from multiple layers rendered at the same position. Used for multi-color characters, equipment layers, shadow/glow effects, or any stacked visual.

props.label: Layers
props.description: Array of {sprite_id, tint, blend_mode, offset_x, offset_y, opacity}. Rendered bottom to top.

props.label: Render Priority
props.description: Depth sorting order (lower = behind)

classes.name: Animation
classes.description: Sequence of sprite frames with timing. Defines how a character or object animates through a series of visual states.

props.label: Frames
props.description: Array of {sprite_id, duration_ms, offset_x, offset_y, flip_h, flip_v}

props.label: Frame Rate
props.description: Frames per second (alternative to per-frame duration)

props.label: Repeat
props.description: Times to repeat. -1=infinite, 0=play once

props.label: Yoyo
props.description: Play forward then reverse

props.label: On Complete Event
props.description: Event emitted when animation finishes

props.label: Chain Animation
props.description: Next animation to auto-play on completion

classes.name: Character
classes.description: Game character — player, enemy, NPC, or boss. Combines visual representation, physics, state, behavior, and combat into a single game entity.

props.label: Sprite
props.description: Single-layer sprite

props.label: Sprite Overlay
props.description: Multi-layer composite sprite

props.label: Animations
props.description: Map of state->animation_id: {idle, walk, run, jump, fall, attack, climb, stun, death, ...}

props.label: Collision Box
props.description: {x, y, width, height} relative to sprite origin

props.label: Attack Box
props.description: {x, y, width, height} hit area during attack

props.label: Speed
props.description: Base movement speed

props.label: AI Behavior
props.description: AI for enemy/NPC characters

props.label: Data Variables
props.description: Custom key-value pairs with change events (score, ammo, power_level, etc.)

props.label: Attached Objects
props.description: Child objects with relative transform (weapons, shields, effects)

props.label: Depth
props.description: Render order within scene

classes.name: Physics Config
classes.description: Movement physics parameters. Gravity, jump arcs, acceleration, terminal velocity, friction. Defines how a character moves through the game world.

props.label: Gravity
props.description: Downward acceleration per tick

props.label: Jump Velocity
props.description: Initial upward velocity on jump

props.label: Walk Speed
props.description: Horizontal movement speed

props.label: Run Speed
props.description: Horizontal sprint speed

props.label: Max Fall Speed
props.description: Terminal velocity

props.label: Climb Speed
props.description: Ladder/wall climb speed

props.label: Acceleration
props.description: How fast character reaches walk/run speed

props.label: Drag
props.description: Deceleration when no input (friction)

props.label: Bounce
props.description: Bounciness on collision (0=none, 1=full)

props.label: Mass
props.description: Affects collision response between objects

classes.name: Collision Config
classes.description: Collision detection configuration. Defines how collisions are checked between sprites, between sprites and tiles, and what responses they trigger.

props.label: Method
props.description: Detection method: bounding box, circle, pixel-perfect, or tile lookup

props.label: Sprite-Sprite Pairs
props.description: Array of {a, b, response, callback_event}. What happens when objects collide.

props.label: Tile Types
props.description: Array of {tile_index_range, type, response}. Type: solid, platform, ladder, hazard, collectible

props.label: Collision Groups
props.description: Array of {name, collides_with: [group_names]}. Filter which groups check against each other.

props.label: World Bounds
props.description: {x, y, width, height, check_left, check_right, check_up, check_down}

classes.name: Combat Config
classes.description: Combat system parameters. Attack types, damage values, stun durations, invincibility frames, knockback.

props.label: Attacks
props.description: Array of {name, damage, range, duration_ms, cooldown_ms, animation_id, hit_event}

props.label: Stun Duration (ms)
props.description: How long character is stunned after being hit

props.label: I-Frame Duration (ms)
props.description: Invincibility window after taking damage

props.label: Knockback Force
props.description: Push-back velocity applied on hit

props.label: Death Event
props.description: Event emitted when health reaches 0

classes.name: AI Behavior
classes.description: Enemy/NPC AI behavior definition. State machine with transitions, pathfinding rules, and aggression settings.

props.label: States
props.description: Array of {name, action, transitions: [{condition, target_state}]}

props.label: Aggression
props.description: 0.0=passive, 1.0=always attacks

props.label: Detection Range
props.description: Distance at which AI detects the player

props.label: Attack Range
props.description: Distance at which AI initiates attack

props.label: Patrol Points
props.description: Array of {x, y, wait_ms} for patrol routes

classes.name: Scene
classes.description: A game scene — level, room, menu, or any distinct game state. Contains the tilemap, spawn points, collectibles, exits, and scene-specific configuration.

props.label: Background Color
props.description: Hex color for scene background

props.label: Background Image
props.description: URL of background image

props.label: Spawn Points
props.description: Array of {character_id, x, y, direction}

props.label: Collectibles
props.description: Array of {type, x, y, sprite_id, points, required_for_exit}

props.label: Exits
props.description: Array of {direction, target_scene_id, condition, x, y, width, height}

props.label: Camera
props.description: Camera config for this scene

props.label: Lifecycle Hooks
props.description: Handler names: {on_init, on_create, on_update, on_enter, on_exit, on_pause, on_resume}

props.label: Parallel Scene
props.description: Runs alongside other scenes (e.g. HUD overlay)

props.label: Scene Order
props.description: Processing order when multiple scenes active (lower = first)

classes.name: Input Map
classes.description: Maps physical inputs (keyboard, gamepad, touch) to logical game actions. Abstracts hardware so game code only deals with action names.

props.label: Actions
props.description: Array of {name, keys, gamepad_buttons, touch_zone, description}

props.label: Combos
props.description: Array of {name, sequence: [action_names], max_delay_ms, event_name}. Multi-press combos.

props.label: Stick Deadzone
props.description: Analog stick deadzone threshold

classes.name: Sound Bank
classes.description: Collection of sound effects and music tracks. Supports individual files, audio sprites (regions within a single file), and spatial audio.

props.label: Sounds
props.description: Array of {name, url, type, volume, loop, trigger_event}. Type: sfx, music, ambient

props.label: Audio Markers
props.description: Array of {name, start_ms, duration_ms}. Named regions in an audio sprite file.

props.label: Spatial Audio
props.description: Enable positional audio (panning based on source position)

classes.name: HUD
classes.description: Heads-up display configuration. Defines score, lives, health bars, timers, and other status indicators rendered on top of gameplay.

props.label: Elements
props.description: Array of {type, x, y, width, height, format, source_var, style}. Type: score, lives, health_bar, timer, text, icon

props.label: Screen Region
props.description: {x, y, width, height} in pixels. Where the HUD is drawn.

props.label: Fixed to Camera
props.description: HUD stays on screen regardless of camera scroll

props.label: Visible In Scenes
props.description: Scene IDs where this HUD is shown. Empty = all gameplay scenes.

classes.name: Game Loop
classes.description: Main game loop configuration. Defines tick rate, update phases, and the order of game systems per frame.

props.label: Tick Rate
props.description: Game logic updates per second (may differ from render FPS)

props.label: Fixed Timestep
props.description: Use fixed delta time for deterministic physics

props.label: Phases
props.description: Ordered array of {name, handler}. E.g.: [input, ai, physics, collision, animation, render, sound]

props.label: Pause on Blur
props.description: Pause game when browser tab loses focus

classes.name: Game State
classes.description: Runtime game state snapshot. All mutable state during gameplay. Used for save/load, debugging, checkpoints, and replay.

props.label: Current Scene
props.description: Active scene ID

props.label: Character States
props.description: Array of per-character runtime state: {id, pos_x, pos_y, velocity_x, velocity_y, health, state, direction, anim_frame}

props.label: Collectibles
props.description: IDs of collected items

props.label: Game Flags
props.description: Key-value game progression flags (doors_opened, boss_defeated, etc.)

props.label: Checkpoint
props.description: {scene_id, x, y} last checkpoint reached

classes.name: Camera
classes.description: Viewport into the game world. Controls scrolling, following, zoom, and visual effects like shake, fade, and flash.

props.label: Viewport
props.description: {x, y, width, height} in screen pixels

props.label: World Bounds
props.description: {x, y, width, height} camera scroll limits

props.label: Follow Target
props.description: Character ID the camera tracks

props.label: Follow Smoothing
props.description: {x, y} smoothing factor 0-1. Lower = smoother follow

props.label: Deadzone
props.description: {width, height} area where target moves without camera following

props.label: Zoom
props.description: 1=normal, 2=2x zoom in, 0.5=zoom out

props.label: Rotation
props.description: Camera rotation in radians

props.label: Round Pixels
props.description: Snap to integer positions to prevent sub-pixel blur

props.label: Background Color
props.description: Hex color for areas outside world bounds

props.label: Available Effects
props.description: Array of {type, config}. Types: shake, fade, flash, pan, zoom_to

classes.name: Tween
classes.description: Smooth property interpolation over time. Animates any numeric property: position, scale, alpha, rotation, color. Used for moving platforms, doors, UI transitions, cutscenes.

props.label: Target ID
props.description: ID of the object to tween

props.label: Properties
props.description: Array of {key, from, to}. Properties and value ranges to interpolate.

props.label: Repeat
props.description: -1 = infinite

props.label: Yoyo
props.description: Reverse back to start values on completion

props.label: Hold (ms)
props.description: Pause at end value before yoyo/repeat

props.label: Chain Tween
props.description: Next tween to auto-play on completion

classes.name: Particle Emitter
classes.description: Spawns short-lived visual particles for effects: explosions, sparks, dust, fire, smoke, sparkles, blood.

props.label: Frequency (ms)
props.description: Spawn interval. 0 = burst all at once

props.label: Quantity
props.description: Particles per emission

props.label: Lifespan (ms)
props.description: {min, max} particle lifetime

props.label: Speed
props.description: {min, max} initial particle speed

props.label: Angle
props.description: {min, max} emission angle in degrees

props.label: Scale
props.description: {start, end} particle scale over lifetime

props.label: Alpha
props.description: {start, end} particle opacity over lifetime

props.label: Tint Colors
props.description: Hex colors randomly assigned to particles

props.label: Emit Zone
props.description: {type, source}. Type: point, rect, circle, edge

props.label: Follow Target
props.description: Character/object ID to attach emitter to

classes.name: Timer Event
classes.description: Delayed or repeating timed event. Enemy spawn intervals, power-up durations, cooldowns, countdowns, delayed actions.

props.label: Repeat
props.description: -1 = infinite

props.label: Event Name
props.description: Event emitted when timer fires

props.label: Event Data
props.description: Payload passed with the event

props.label: Scene
props.description: Scene this timer belongs to (pauses with scene)

classes.name: Object Pool
classes.description: Reusable object pool. Pre-allocates and recycles frequently spawned objects (bullets, enemies, collectibles, particles) for performance.

props.label: Object Class
props.description: ES class ID of pooled objects

props.label: Create If Empty
props.description: Auto-expand when all objects active

props.label: Default Properties
props.description: Values applied when recycling an object

props.label: Run Child Update
props.description: Call update() on active pool members each tick

classes.name: Trigger Zone
classes.description: Invisible area that fires events on character entry/exit/overlap. Room transitions, traps, checkpoints, boss encounters, secrets, cutscene triggers.

props.label: On Overlap Event
props.description: Fires every tick while overlapping

props.label: Trigger For
props.description: Character IDs or types that activate this zone. Empty = all.

props.label: One-Shot
props.description: Deactivate after first trigger

props.label: Event Data
props.description: Custom payload passed with trigger events

classes.name: Asset Manifest
classes.description: External asset loading manifest. Lists all files to preload before game or scene starts. Supports images, spritesheets, atlases, tilemaps, audio, JSON, binary.

props.label: Base URL
props.description: Prefix for all asset paths

props.label: Entries
props.description: Array of {key, type, url, config}. Type: image, spritesheet, atlas, tilemap_json, audio, audio_sprite, bitmap_font, json, binary

props.label: Load Scene
props.description: Which scene uses this manifest (global or per-scene)

props.label: On Progress Event
props.description: Event emitted with {percent, file} during loading
